title: VS: Logistics
description: Adds ways to transfer resources between ships
body:
# VS Logistics

VS Logistics adds basic fluid logistics that work properly with Valkyrien Skies ships.

The main focus of the mod is moving fluids using pumps and flexible hoses that continue to work while ships are moving and rotating. Unlike vanilla or most Create setups, the hoses don’t desync or visually break when used on ships.

## What this mod adds

Fluid pumps that can transfer fluids over a distance

Flexible hoses between pumps, blocks, and players

Hoses render and behave correctly on moving ships

Works both in the normal world and on Valkyrien Skies ships

Designed to fit naturally alongside Create-style builds

## Why use this?

VS Logistics is made specifically for ships, so you can build:

Refueling systems for airships

Mobile factories

Docking and resupply setups
